message:
Apply rustfmt across all crates

Run cargo fmt on the entire workspace. No logic changes; purely
mechanical reformatting of long lines, inline if/else blocks, match
arms, import ordering, and trailing whitespace.

Key areas touched:
- ftui-runtime: Expand inline NaN-guard ternaries to multi-line blocks
  (bocpd.rs, voi_sampling.rs, allocation_budget.rs, input_fairness.rs)
- ftui-core: Break long .expect() chains in s3_fifo.rs
- ftui-text: Expand inline if/else in bidi.rs, editor.rs, wrap.rs
- ftui-layout: Reformat match arms in cache.rs, dep_graph.rs
- ftui-widgets: Line-wrapping in command_palette, file_picker, tree,
  progress, list, input, virtualized
- ftui-render: Collapse over-expanded cup() calls in presenter.rs
- ftui-extras: Expand format!() macros in markdown.rs, syntax.rs
- ftui-harness: Fix import ordering, expand tracing chains
- doctor_frankentui: Break long method chains and IrBuilder calls
- ftui-demo-showcase: Reformat deterministic mode setup calls

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
